headline: Is It Time To Reassess CF Industries (CF) After Its Strong 12-Month Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether CF Industries Holdings at US$127.98 still offers value, the starting point is to understand how its current share price lines up against a range of valuation measures. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 0.1% decline over the last 7 days, a 22.7% gain over 30 days, and returns of 59.7% year to date and 64.0% over the past 12 months. These moves can change how the market is viewing both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage has focused on CF...
